name: Toxic Runoff Creek
text:
Toxic Runoff Creek enters the battlefield tapped.
When Toxic Runoff Creek enters the battlefield, it deals 1 damage to you. You drank from the creek. Everyone drank from the creek. The creek was a mistake.
{T}: Add {R} or {G}.
flavorText: It glows a little at night. The town calls it 'the pretty part of the walk.'
